document: Aapka PM Kisan ka paisa ruk gaya hai technical error ki wajah se. Apna bank account aur IFSC code yahan bhejiye jisse paisa release ho sake.
Aapko PM Ujjwala Yojana ke tahat free mobile phone milega! Is message ko 20 logo ko bhejo. Sarkar de rahi hai limited time mein.
Atal Pension Yojana update: Your account needs verification. Share your APY PRAN number and Aadhaar on WhatsApp: 9988776655 for immediate processing.
Ayushman Bharat card banwao online! Fees: Rs 250 only. Contact: 9876543210. Visit: ayushman-card-apply.online
BREAKING: Modi ji ne announce kiya - sabke account mein 10000 aayenge! Register here: http://modi-yojana.click/claim. Limited time offer!
Check your PM Kisan eKYC status — click this link: https://bit.ly/pmkisan-ekyc-update2024. Do it before tomorrow to avoid payment stop.
Congratulations! Aapka naam PM Kisan scheme mein select hua hai. Apna 6000 rupaye lene ke liye registration fee Rs 99 pay karein: UPI 7878000000@paytm
Congratulations! You have been selected for PM Awas Yojana. Pay Rs 500 registration fee to get Rs 2.5 lakh housing grant. UPI: pmawas@ybl
Dear beneficiary, your DBT payment is on hold. Submit KYC by sharing your Aadhaar number, date of birth and mother's name on this WhatsApp.
E-Shram card banwao ghar baithe! Sirf 200 rupaye mein. WhatsApp karein: 8765432109. Aadhar front-back photo bhejo.
Free laptop scheme by state government! Fill form at http://free-laptop-scheme.ga/apply. Share with 5 groups to confirm your application.
Jan Dhan account holders ko milega 5000 ka special bonus. Missed call do: 9000000000 aur OTP share karo activate karne ke liye.
Kisan Credit Card limit badha di gayi hai 5 lakh tak! Activate karne ke liye apna card number aur PIN yahan bhejiye.
Ladli Behna Yojana ka paisa double ho jayega agar aap ye link open karein aur apna OTP verify karein: http://ladli-behna-bonus.xyz/verify
Mukhyamantri Kanya Utthan Yojana - 50000 ka cheque ready hai aapke naam pe. Processing fee 1000 rupaye bhejiye UPI pe jaldi karo.
Official message from Ministry of Agriculture: All PM Kisan beneficiaries must re-verify their bank accounts by clicking: http://pmkisan-verify.net/update
PM Garib Kalyan Yojana ke tahat free ration register karne ke liye abhi click karein: http://pmgky-free-ration.tk/apply. OTP bhejiye.
PM Kisan ka paisa aa raha hai, apna OTP yahan bhejiye taki 6000 rupaye turant milein. Click karein: http://pm-kisan-yojana.xyz/claim
PM Ujjwala Yojana ke tahat free gas connection mil raha hai. Abhi register karein: http://ujjwala-free.tk/register Apna Aadhar number bhejiye.
PMJAY Ayushman card renewal ki last date hai kal! Apna Aadhar, mobile number aur bank details yahan submit karo: http://pmjay-renew.click
Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana — Gramin list mein aapka naam aaya hai. 2.5 lakh ka grant check karne ke liye: http://pmay-gramin-check.info/suchi
Sarkar de rahi hai 15000 rupaye har mahine! Bas ye form bharo aur bank details do. Last date aaj hi hai! Forward ye message 10 logon ko.
Sarkari Message: Aapko PM SVANIDHI loan scheme ke tahat 50000 rupaye ka loan milega. Confirm karne ke liye apna Aadhar bhejiye is number par.
Scholarship amount aapke account mein transfer hogi. Pehle apna NSP portal login karein is link par: http://nsp-scholarship.online/login
Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana mein 1 lakh ka bonus mil raha hai sabko! WhatsApp pe apni details bhejo: naam, Aadhar, bank account number.
Your MGNREGA payment of Rs 3500 is pending. Login and verify at: http://mgnrega-payment.xyz/login using your job card number.
Your Ration Card has been suspended. Click here immediately to reactivate: http://ration-update.bit.ly/verify. Enter your mobile OTP to restore access.
आपका Ujjwala gas connection कट सकता है! अभी अपना Aadhaar verify करें वरना connection बंद हो जाएगा। Link: http://ujjwala-verify.site
किसान भाइयों को ख़ुशखबरी! PM Kisan Samman Nidhi में 2000 से बढ़कर 8000 मिलेगा। अभी register करें: http://pmkisan-8000.xyz
सरकार दे रही है 5 लाख का MSME loan बिना guarantee के! Apply करें: http://msme-loan-free.online और अपनी company details भेजें।
